</user_query>

Exploring how the UI package exposes theme colors and scanning the codebase for Tailwind color utilities that could be replaced.

[REDACTED]

input.query: Where are theme colors or CSS variables defined for components?

content.text:
Noting a split: [`theme.css`](packages/ui/src/styles/theme.css) defines the full scale (`primary-*`, `secondary-*`, `tertiary-*`, shadcn semantics, `chart-*`), while [`globals.css`](packages/ui/src/styles/globals.css) exposes only semantic shadcn tokens in `@theme inline`—no numeric scales. Apps that only import `globals.css` cannot use `bg-secondary-600` unless we add imports or merge theme variables.

[REDACTED]

input.name: Theme color migration
input.overview: Replace raw Tailwind palette classes (e.g. `slate-*`, `blue-*`, `red-*`) with design tokens from `@workspace/ui` (`theme.css`): semantic tokens (`foreground`, `muted`, `border`, `destructive`, …), extended scales (`primary-*`, `secondary-*`, `tertiary-*`), and chart tokens where appropriate. About **84** TS/TSX files match today; largest clusters are **`apps/org`**, **`packages/ui`**, **`apps/auth`**, and **`apps/donor`**.
input.plan:
# Migrate Tailwind palette classes to UI theme tokens

## Context

- **Source of truth for tokens**: [`packages/ui/src/styles/theme.css`](packages/ui/src/styles/theme.css) documents the mapping (e.g. primary scale = slate, `secondary-*` = blue scale) and exposes them under `@theme inline` as Tailwind utilities: `bg-primary-100`, `text-secondary-600`, `border-border`, `text-destructive`, `text-chart-2`, etc.
- **Weaker / incomplete theme in some apps**: [`packages/ui/src/styles/globals.css`](packages/ui/src/styles/globals.css) only registers **semantic** shadcn variables in `@theme inline` (no `primary-50`–`primary-900` / `secondary-*` numeric scales). Apps that import **only** `globals.css` today include **org** ([`apps/org/src/components/app-shell.tsx`](apps/org/src/components/app-shell.tsx)), **donor** ([`apps/donor/src/routes/__root.tsx`](apps/donor/src/routes/__root.tsx)), **builder** ([`apps/builder/src/components/app-shell.tsx`](apps/builder/src/components/app-shell.tsx)), and **storybook** ([`apps/storybook/.storybook/preview.tsx`](apps/storybook/.storybook/preview.tsx)). Apps already on **full** theme: **auth**, **public-pages**, **org-next** import `@workspace/ui/theme.css`.
- **Naming trap**: In `theme.css`, **`bg-secondary`** is the shadcn “secondary surface” token; **`bg-secondary-600`** is the **blue** scale. Use the **numeric** utilities for “Tailwind blue” replacements.

## Prerequisite (do first)

Pick **one** approach so numeric tokens work everywhere you migrate:

1. **Recommended**: Switch legacy app roots from `@workspace/ui/globals.css` to **`@workspace/ui/theme.css`** (same pattern as auth/org-next), **or** add a second import of `theme.css` **only if** you verify no conflicting duplicate `:root` / `@theme` blocks (prefer a single consolidated import to avoid drift).
2. **Alternative**: Extend [`globals.css`](packages/ui/src/styles/globals.css) `@theme inline` to include the same `--color-primary-*`, `--color-secondary-*`, `--color-tertiary-*` mappings as [`theme.css`](packages/ui/src/styles/theme.css) so one file carries both semantics and scales.

Until this is done, restrict those apps to **semantic-only** swaps (`text-muted-foreground`, `border-border`, `text-destructive`) or keep raw Tailwind for hues that have no token yet.

## Mapping guide (apply consistently)

Use **semantic** tokens when they express role; use **scales** when you need a specific hue/step.

| Typical raw class | Prefer |
|-------------------|--------|
| `text-slate-*`, `text-gray-*`, `text-neutral-*` (body/secondary) | `text-foreground`, `text-muted-foreground`, or `text-primary-*` for stepped neutrals |
| `border-slate-*`, `border-gray-*` | `border-border` (or `border-input` where “field outline” is intended) |
| `bg-slate-50`, `bg-gray-100`, etc. (muted panels) | `bg-muted`, `bg-accent`, or `bg-primary-100` / `bg-secondary-50` when matching design steps |
| `bg-white` / `text-gray-900` | `bg-background` / `bg-card`, `text-foreground`, `text-card-foreground` as appropriate |
| `blue-*` (links, icons, CTAs matching brand blue) | **`secondary-*`** scale (documented as blue in `theme.css`), e.g. `text-secondary-600`, `bg-secondary-600`, `border-secondary-200` |
| `red-*` (errors, destructive) | `text-destructive`, `bg-destructive`, `border-destructive`, optional `bg-destructive/10` for soft surfaces |
| `green-*` / success | No dedicated `--success` today: use **`text-chart-2`** / **`bg-chart-2/…`** for theme consistency, or agree on adding `--success` / `--warning` in `theme.css` if product wants fixed success/warning hues |
| `yellow-*` / `amber-*` (warnings) | **`chart-4` / `chart-5`** or muted `secondary`/`primary` neutrals depending on intent |
| `teal-*` | **`chart-2`** (teal in comments) or **`tertiary-*`** where it matches hue |
| Focus rings `ring-blue-500` | **`ring-ring`** or **`ring-secondary-500`** if “brand” focus is required |
| Sidebar-specific surfaces | Prefer existing **`sidebar-*`** tokens already used in sidebar primitives |

**Special cases to align by hand**

- [`packages/ui/src/components/ui/badge.tsx`](packages/ui/src/components/ui/badge.tsx): `text-slate-900` → likely `text-card-foreground` or `text-foreground` depending on badge surface.
- [`packages/ui/src/components/typography/text.tsx`](packages/ui/src/components/typography/text.tsx): `success` variant uses `text-green-400` → chart or new token.
- [`packages/ui/src/components/radio-button-group.tsx`](packages/ui/src/components/radio-button-group.tsx): dense mix of `neutral-*`, `slate-*`, `blue-400` → map to `primary-*` / `secondary-*` / `muted` / `foreground` for light+dark.

## Rollout by area (file-backed hotspots)

Work **foundation-first** (`packages/ui` + shared packages), then apps.

### 1. `@workspace/ui` ([`packages/ui/src`](packages/ui/src))

Representative files from grep: [`searchable-infinite-dropdown.tsx`](packages/ui/src/components/searchable-infinite-dropdown.tsx), [`searchable-infinite-list.tsx`](packages/ui/src/components/searchable-infinite-list.tsx), [`inputs/auto-complete.tsx`](packages/ui/src/components/inputs/auto-complete.tsx), [`ui/sidebar.tsx`](packages/ui/src/components/ui/sidebar.tsx), [`radio-button-group.tsx`](packages/ui/src/components/radio-button-group.tsx), [`layouts/table-page-layout.tsx`](packages/ui/src/components/layouts/table-page-layout.tsx), [`nav-user.tsx`](packages/ui/src/components/nav-user.tsx), [`ui/card.tsx`](packages/ui/src/components/ui/card.tsx), [`inputs/days-of-month-input.tsx`](packages/ui/src/components/inputs/days-of-month-input.tsx), [`app-shell/app-shell.tsx`](packages/ui/src/components/app-shell/app-shell.tsx), plus smaller spots in **label**/ **checkbox-with-label**/ **settings-nav**/ **nav-main**.

These components ship everywhere; migrating them maximizes consistency.

### 2. `packages/form`

- [`switch-field.tsx`](packages/form/src/fields/switch-field.tsx): `text-red-500` → `text-destructive`.
- [`form.stories.tsx`](packages/form/src/stories/form.stories.tsx): story-only `text-gray-500` → `text-muted-foreground`.

### 3. `apps/org` (largest volume)

High-touch files (non-exhaustive): [`app-shell.tsx`](apps/org/src/components/app-shell.tsx) (many `text-blue-*` icon colors), [`image-uploader/image-uploader.tsx`](apps/org/src/components/image-uploader/image-uploader.tsx), [`finance/components/csv-upload/csv-upload-modal.tsx`](apps/org/src/components/finance/components/csv-upload/csv-upload-modal.tsx), [`accounts/dashboard/components/metric-card.tsx`](apps/org/src/components/accounts/dashboard/components/metric-card.tsx), [`table/filters-actions-layout.tsx`](apps/org/src/components/table/filters-actions-layout.tsx), hooks under `finance/**/hooks/*.tsx`, media manager, settings flows.

Replace blues with **`secondary-*`**, neutrals with **`muted` / `primary-*`**, reds with **`destructive`**, greens/yellows with **`chart-*`** or agreed semantic additions.

### 4. `apps/auth`

Routes and components ([`sign-in.tsx`](apps/auth/src/routes/sign-in.tsx), [`sign-up.tsx`](apps/auth/src/routes/sign-up.tsx), [`marketing-carousel.tsx`](apps/auth/src/components/marketing-carousel.tsx), [`error.tsx`](apps/auth/src/routes/error.tsx), etc.): already on `theme.css`; safe to use full **`secondary-*`** / **`primary-*`** mapping.

### 5. `apps/donor`, `apps/public-pages`, `apps/builder`, `apps/org-next`

- **Donor/public-pages/builder**: align CSS import prerequisite, then migrate (e.g. donor [`error-boundary.tsx`](apps/donor/src/components/error-boundary.tsx), [`account-contact-section.tsx`](apps/donor/src/components/account-contact-section.tsx)).
- **org-next**: [`-marketing-carousel.tsx`](apps/org-next/src/routes/-marketing-carousel.tsx) still uses **`from-amber-50` / `to-yellow-50` / `to-teal-50`** — replace with theme-backed gradients (e.g. `from-chart-4/30 to-chart-5/30`, `to-tertiary-50`, or documented chart/tertiary pairs). [`-app-sidebar.tsx`](apps/org-next/src/routes/_authed/-app-sidebar.tsx): `bg-blue-600` → `bg-secondary-600` (or `bg-sidebar-primary` if it must match sidebar brand).

### 6. Storybook / examples

- Story and example files ([`tab-panel.example.tsx`](packages/ui/src/components/tab-panel.example.tsx), story files under `apps/storybook`): update for consistency; low user impact but keeps screenshots/docs honest.

## Verification

- After edits, run scoped checks: `pnpm --filter @workspace/ui lint` / typecheck, then app-level lint for touched apps.
- Visual smoke: org shell sidebar icons, auth sign-in/up, finance CSV modal, donor error boundary.

## Documentation

- If you consolidate `globals.css` vs `theme.css` or change import expectations, add a short note to [`packages/ui/README.md`](packages/ui/README.md) (theme section) so future work uses one entrypoint.
- Per [apps/org-next/AGENTS.md](apps/org-next/AGENTS.md), if org-next-only styling conventions change, add a minimal note under [`apps/org-next/docs/`](apps/org-next/docs/) (only if behavior or “source of theme” contract changes).

todos.content: Decide and implement globals vs theme.css strategy so primary-*/secondary-* utilities resolve in org/donor/builder/storybook
Replace raw palette classes in packages/ui (sidebar, inputs, searchable-*, radio-button-group, card, badge, typography, app-shell)
Update packages/form + storybook/examples to theme tokens
Migrate apps/org (bulk), auth, donor, public-pages, builder, org-next with mapping table
Run lint/typecheck on touched packages; update ui README and org-next docs only if import contract changes

<user_query>
Ask me any questions that the plan may have so that we are 100% aligned on the work to be done
</user_query>

Asking a few decisions that determine scope and implementation approach:

[REDACTED]

questions.prompt: How should we expose full theme scales (`primary-*`, `secondary-*`, …) to apps that today import only `@workspace/ui/globals.css` (org, donor, builder, storybook)?

options.label: Switch those apps to `@workspace/ui/theme.css` (single consolidated theme entry; resolve any overlap with globals carefully)
Keep apps on globals.css but extend its `@theme inline` with the same scale mappings as theme.css
Don’t change CSS imports for legacy apps yet — only swap to semantic tokens available in globals (muted, border, destructive, foreground, …) and leave raw hues where scales aren’t available

questions.prompt: For success (green) and warning (yellow/amber) states that aren’t covered by `destructive`, what should we do?

options.label: Map to existing theme tokens only (`chart-*`, `tertiary-*`, opacity variants) — accept possible hue shifts
Add new CSS variables in `theme.css` (e.g. `--success`, `--warning`) and wire them in `@theme inline` as part of this work
Leave green/yellow/amber Tailwind classes until design supplies official tokens

questions.prompt: How do you want the work delivered?

options.label: Phased: UI package + form first, then apps in follow-ups (recommended for reviewability)
One larger change touching all affected areas
By app: complete one app (e.g. org) end-to-end before moving to the next

---
name: Theme color migration
overview: "Replace raw Tailwind palette classes with design tokens from `@workspace/ui/theme.css`: semantic tokens, extended scales (`primary-*`, `secondary-*`, `tertiary-*`), new **success** / **warning** semantics, plus chart tokens where appropriate. **Locked decisions:** migrate legacy apps to **`theme.css`** (not globals-only); add **`--success` / `--warning`** (light + dark) in theme and `@theme inline`; deliver as **one PR**. ~84 TS/TSX files match today; largest clusters: **`apps/org`**, **`packages/ui`**, **`apps/auth`**, **`apps/donor`**."
todos:
  - id: css-entrypoints
    content: Switch org/donor/builder/storybook from globals-only to theme.css; resolve import order / duplicate base styles if any component still pulls globals.css
    status: pending
  - id: success-warning-tokens
    content: Add --success, --warning (and foreground if needed) in theme.css :root/.dark + @theme inline; map greens/ambers/yellows to text-success, bg-warning/10, etc.
    status: pending
  - id: migrate-ui-package
    content: Replace raw palette classes in packages/ui (sidebar, inputs, searchable-*, radio-button-group, card, badge, typography, app-shell)
    status: pending
  - id: migrate-form-storybook
    content: Update packages/form + storybook/examples to theme tokens
    status: pending
  - id: migrate-apps
    content: Migrate apps/org (bulk), auth, donor, public-pages, builder, org-next
    status: pending
  - id: verify-docs
    content: Run lint/typecheck (repo validate or scoped); update packages/ui README for theme.css as canonical app entrypoint + new tokens
    status: pending
isProject: false
---

# Migrate Tailwind palette classes to UI theme tokens

## Locked decisions (stakeholder alignment)

1. **CSS strategy**: Migrate **org**, **donor**, **builder**, and **storybook** from **`@workspace/ui/globals.css`-only** to **`@workspace/ui/theme.css`** as the canonical full theme (same direction as auth / org-next / public-pages). Verify no conflicting double-import of globals + theme in the same app without intent; resolve **packages/ui** `build:css` / Postcss output if anything still assumes `globals.css` only.
2. **Success / warning**: Add **`--success`** and **`--warning`** (and **`--success-foreground` / `--warning-foreground`** if needed for contrast) in [`packages/ui/src/styles/theme.css`](packages/ui/src/styles/theme.css) for `:root` and `.dark`, register them under `@theme inline`, then replace raw greens / yellows / ambers with utilities like **`text-success`**, **`bg-success/10`**, **`border-warning`**, etc.
3. **Delivery**: **Single PR** touching foundation + all listed apps/packages (still implement in a sensible order: tokens + imports → `packages/ui` → apps).

## Context

- **Source of truth**: [`packages/ui/src/styles/theme.css`](packages/ui/src/styles/theme.css) — primary scale = slate, **`secondary-*`** = blue scale; semantic shadcn tokens; **`chart-*`** for categorical color.
- **Naming trap**: **`bg-secondary`** = shadcn secondary surface; **`bg-secondary-600`** = blue scale step. Use numeric utilities for “Tailwind blue” replacements.

## Implementation order

1. **Entrypoints**: Replace `import "@workspace/ui/globals.css"` with `import "@workspace/ui/theme.css"` where applicable (org shell, donor root, builder shell, storybook preview). Confirm auth/public-pages/org-next stay consistent (already on `theme.css`).
2. **New tokens**: Implement success/warning in `theme.css` (pick OKLCH values aligned with existing chart/destructive quality; ensure dark mode reads correctly).
3. **Replace classes** across [`packages/ui`](packages/ui/src), [`packages/form`](packages/form/src), and apps using the mapping below.
4. **Verify**: `pnpm run validate` or at minimum lint + typecheck for touched workspaces; spot-check high-visibility surfaces (org sidebar, auth flows, CSV modal, donor error boundary).

## Mapping guide

| Typical raw class | Prefer |
|-------------------|--------|
| `text-slate-*`, `text-gray-*`, `text-neutral-*` | `text-foreground`, `text-muted-foreground`, `text-primary-*` |
| `border-slate-*`, `border-gray-*` | `border-border` or `border-input` |
| `bg-slate-50`, `bg-gray-100`, … | `bg-muted`, `bg-accent`, `bg-primary-100`, `bg-secondary-50` |
| `bg-white` / `text-gray-900` | `bg-background` / `bg-card`, `text-foreground`, `text-card-foreground` |
| `blue-*` (brand / links) | **`secondary-*`** |
| `red-*` (errors) | `destructive` family |
| `green-*` (success) | **`success`** family (after tokens land) |
| `yellow-*` / `amber-*` (warnings) | **`warning`** family (after tokens land) |
| `teal-*` | `tertiary-*` or `chart-2` where semantic fit |
| Focus `ring-blue-500` | `ring-ring` or `ring-secondary-500` |
| Sidebar chrome | **`sidebar-*`** |

**Special cases**

- [`packages/ui/src/components/ui/badge.tsx`](packages/ui/src/components/ui/badge.tsx): `text-slate-900` → `text-foreground` or `text-card-foreground` by surface.
- [`packages/ui/src/components/typography/text.tsx`](packages/ui/src/components/typography/text.tsx): success variant → `text-success` (once token exists).
- [`packages/ui/src/components/radio-button-group.tsx`](packages/ui/src/components/radio-button-group.tsx): map neutrals/blues to theme tokens for light + dark.

## Rollout by area (single PR)

- **packages/ui**: Searchable dropdowns/lists, sidebar, inputs, radio group, card, badge, typography, app-shell, nav, table layout, examples.
- **packages/form**: switch field + stories.
- **apps/org**: bulk (app-shell icons, finance CSV modal, metric cards, tables, media manager, hooks).
- **apps/auth**, **donor**, **public-pages**, **builder**, **org-next**: remaining grep hits; org-next marketing carousel gradients → **`warning` / `success` / `tertiary`** as appropriate instead of raw `amber-50`, `yellow-50`, `teal-50`.
- **Storybook**: story files + [`tab-panel.example.tsx`](packages/ui/src/components/tab-panel.example.tsx).

## Documentation

- Update [`packages/ui/README.md`](packages/ui/README.md): **`theme.css`** is the canonical app import; document **`success`** / **`warning`** tokens once added.

content.text:
Here’s what we aligned on and how the plan was updated:

### Your answers

1. **CSS strategy** — Legacy apps (**org**, **donor**, **builder**, **storybook**) should move from **`globals.css`-only** to **`theme.css`** so full scales and semantics match auth/org-next.

2. **Success / warning** — Add real theme tokens: **`--success`** and **`--warning`** (plus foreground variants if needed), wire them in **`@theme inline`**, then use utilities like `text-success` / `bg-warning/10` instead of raw greens and ambers.

3. **Delivery** — **One PR** that covers tokens, imports, `packages/ui`, form, storybook, and all apps.

### Plan file

[`theme_color_migration_dccf91b6.plan.md`](/Users/duhl/.cursor/plans/theme_color_migration_dccf91b6.plan.md) is updated with a **Locked decisions** section, a new todo **`success-warning-tokens`**, refreshed **`css-entrypoints`** wording, and the mapping table adjusted so success/warning use the new tokens instead of chart-only fallbacks.

When you’re ready to implement, say so and we can execute against this plan.

[REDACTED]

</user_query>

todos.content: Migrate apps (org, auth, donor, public-pages, builder, org-next)

input.old_string:
## Theme System

Our component library uses a robust theme system based on CSS variables that:

1. Supports both light and dark modes
2. Provides semantic color tokens (e.g., `primary`, `secondary`)
3. Ensures consistent styling across all components
4. Makes UI updates simple by centralizing design tokens
input.new_string:
## Theme System

Our component library uses a robust theme system based on CSS variables that:

1. Supports both light and dark modes
2. Provides semantic color tokens (e.g., `primary`, `secondary`, `destructive`, `success`, `warning`)
3. Exposes extended scales as Tailwind utilities (e.g., `text-secondary-600`, `bg-primary-100`) via [`src/styles/theme.css`](src/styles/theme.css)
4. Makes UI updates simple by centralizing design tokens

**App setup:** import the full theme in your app entry (Vite/TanStack `styles.css` or root component):

```ts
import "@workspace/ui/theme.css";
```

`@workspace/ui/globals.css` remains available for the PostCSS build of the package but does not register the full `primary-*` / `secondary-*` scale; prefer `theme.css` in applications.

input.command: cd /Users/duhl/git/ui && mise exec -- pnpm run build --filter=@workspace/ui
input.description: Build UI package (tsc + CSS to dist)

input.command: cd /Users/duhl/git/ui && mise exec -- pnpm exec turbo typecheck --filter=@workspace/ui --filter=@workspace/form --filter=auth --filter=donor --filter=org --filter=org-next --filter=public-pages --filter=builder --filter=storybook 2>&1

content.text:
Here’s what was implemented:

### Theme foundation ([`packages/ui/src/styles/theme.css`](packages/ui/src/styles/theme.css))
- Added **`--success` / `--success-foreground`** and **`--warning` / `--warning-foreground`** for light and dark, and registered them in **`@theme inline`** so utilities like `text-success`, `bg-warning/25`, etc. work.

### App CSS entrypoints
- **`@workspace/ui/globals.css`** → **`@workspace/ui/theme.css`** in:
  - [`apps/org/src/components/app-shell.tsx`](apps/org/src/components/app-shell.tsx)
  - [`apps/builder/src/components/app-shell.tsx`](apps/builder/src/components/app-shell.tsx)
  - [`apps/donor/src/routes/__root.tsx`](apps/donor/src/routes/__root.tsx)
  - [`apps/storybook/.storybook/preview.tsx`](apps/storybook/.storybook/preview.tsx)

### Replacements (repo-wide pattern)
- **Blue (brand/UI)** → **`secondary-*`**
- **Neutrals** (`slate`, `gray`, `neutral`, …) → **`foreground`**, **`muted-foreground`**, **`muted`**, **`border`**, **`primary-*`**
- **Red / errors** → **`destructive`**
- **Green / success** → **`success`** (or **`chart-2`** / **`success/10`** where it fit)
- **Yellow / amber / orange callouts** → **`warning`**, **`chart-*`**, or **`warning-foreground`**
- **Teal accents** → **`chart-2`** where it matched “teal” semantics

Touches include **`packages/ui`**, **`packages/form`**, **`apps/org`** (large), **`apps/auth`**, **`apps/donor`** (including [`account-contact-section.tsx`](apps/donor/src/components/account-contact-section.tsx) CVA maps)), **`apps/public-pages`**, **`apps/builder`**, **`apps/org-next`**, and **storybook**.

### Other
- [`packages/form/src/fields/select-field.tsx`](packages/form/src/fields/select-field.tsx): `scrollbar-thumb-gray-300` → `scrollbar-thumb-border`
- [`packages/ui/README.md`](packages/ui/README.md): document **`theme.css`** as the app import and **`success` / `warning`** tokens

### Verification
- `pnpm run build --filter=@workspace/ui`
- `biome check` on touched areas (auto-fixed some formatting)
- `turbo typecheck` for ui, form, auth, donor, org, org-next, public-pages, builder, storybook — all succeeded

All related todos are **completed**.

[REDACTED]
